equipment.name: Baleful tome
equipment.desc: Before the game, select a psychic power from the general psychic powers or the Chaos psychic powers. The model can use this psychic power once per game. Roll 1D6 during the model's activation. On a 3+, the psychic power is successfully manifested with the required cast value. On a 1, the model suffers a "Perils of the Warp" attack.

equipment.name: Bionics
equipment.desc: The model gains a 6+ invulnerable save.

equipment.name: Chaos artifact
equipment.desc:
One weapon of the model gains one of the following:
- Additional +6" Range (only for ranged weapons)
- Additional +1 Strength
- Additional -1 AP
- Additional +1 AT
Every enhancement is unique per army. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Cursed blade
equipment.desc: One melee weapon of the model gains +1 Damage. The point cost for this equipment is the same as for the weapon that it enhances. Can only be used on weapons with D:1. Only for Lieutenants.

equipment.name: Icon of Chaos
equipment.desc: A friendly Daemon unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. If the arriving unit has the same Mark of Chaos as the bearer, it can instead be placed within 6". The icon must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Chaos Space Marine bike
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement, +1 Toughness, +1 Wound, a Combi-bolter and the unit type "Bike". Infantry only.

equipment.name: Demagogue
equipment.desc: The model and its attached unit gain the "Fearless" ability. Only for Dark Apostles. Unique.

equipment.name: Daemon weapon
equipment.desc: Select one ability from the "Daemon weapons" section and apply it to one weapon of the model. Can't be combined with "Greater Daemon weapon".

equipment.name: Daemonic armor
equipment.desc: The model gains a 2+ save.

equipment.name: Daemonic aura
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Daemon" ability (Note: a 5+ invulnerability save).

equipment.name: Daemonic essence
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Wound.

equipment.name: Daemonic flight / jump pack
equipment.desc: The model gains +6" Movement and the unit type "Jump Pack Infantry". Infantry only.

equipment.name: Daemonic mutation
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Attack.

equipment.name: Daemonic resilience
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Toughness.

equipment.name: Daemonic stature
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Monstrous Infantry" unit type and the "Deepstrike" ability.

equipment.name: Daemonic strength
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Strength.

equipment.name: Daemonic swiftness
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Move Through Cover" and may reroll advance rolls.

equipment.name: Daemonic venom
equipment.desc: All melee attacks of the model gain "Poison(4+)"

equipment.name: Familiar
equipment.desc: The model may sacrifice the Familiar to reroll a psychic power manifestation test. While it is alive, the model gains +1 Initiative. Only for Sorcerers.

equipment.name: Greater Daemon weapon
equipment.desc: Select two abilities from the "Daemon weapons" section and apply it to one weapon of the model. Can't be combined with "Daemon weapon".

equipment.name: Instrument of Chaos
equipment.desc: The unit gains a bonus of +1 to Combat resolutions.

equipment.name: Marksman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Ballistic skill.

equipment.name: Master-crafted weapon
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to hit roll per activation. Must be purchased for each weapon seperately.

equipment.name: Personal icon
equipment.desc: A friendly Daemon unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The icon must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Psychic training
equipment.desc: The model knows one additional psychic power from one of their chosen psychic disciplines. If it already knows all powers from each discipline, it may instead learn one power from a new discipline it has access to. Can be taken multiple times.

equipment.name: Spikey bits
equipment.desc: The model may re-roll one to wound roll in melee per activation.

equipment.name: Swordsman honours
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Weapon skill.

equipment.name: Teleport homing beacon
equipment.desc: A friendly unit arriving within 3" of the bearer via Deep strike does not scatter. The Teleport homer must be present on the table at the beginning of the battle round in order to be used.

equipment.name: Terminator armor
equipment.desc: The model gains +1 Toughness, +1 Attack, a 2+ armor save, a 5+ invulnerable save and the abilities "Deep strike", "Massive(1)" and "Unyielding". Only for infantry.

equipment.name: Trophy
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Terrifying(-1)".

equipment.name: Counter-attack
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Counter-attack".

equipment.name: Favoured enemy
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Favoured enemy".

equipment.name: Furious charge
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Furious charge".

equipment.name: Infiltrator
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Infiltrator".

equipment.name: Outflank
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Outflank".

equipment.name: Tank hunter
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Tank hunter".

equipment.name: Terrain expert
equipment.desc: The model gains the abilities "Move through cover" and "Use cover".

equipment.name: Vanguard
equipment.desc: The model gains the ability "Vanguard".

equipment.name: Additional armor
equipment.desc: The model ignores the first "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage each round.

equipment.name: Blasphemous Rune
equipment.desc: The model may attempt to deny one psychic power per battle round.

equipment.name: Daemonic possession
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Daemon" ability (5+ invulnerability save). The model reduces its BS and WS by -1. The model ignores "Crew Shaken" vehicle damage. If transporting a unit, during each activation roll 1D6 per model — on a 1 or 2 the unit suffers a Mortal Wound.

equipment.name: Dirge Caster
equipment.desc: Friendly models within 6" gain the "Fearless" ability.

equipment.name: Hunter-killer missile
equipment.desc: The model gains a Hunter-killer missile.

equipment.name: Improved targeting
equipment.desc: The model does not have to declare its ranged weapon targets before firing and can choose a new target for each weapon.

equipment.name: Jammer
equipment.desc: Equipment such as icons or homing beacons do not function within 6" of the model. Units arriving via deep strike that land within 12" roll 4D6 instead of 2D6 for scattering.

equipment.name: Living vehicle
equipment.desc: The model gains the "Living vehicle" weapon and improves its WS to 4+, unless it is already better.

equipment.name: Mutated Hull
equipment.desc: The model increases its Armor Value (AV) on one side by +1, to a maximum of 14.

equipment.name: Smoke Launcher
equipment.desc: Once per game: instead of firing weapons, or if not yet activated and targeted by an enemy, the model activates smoke. Enemy units can only deal glancing hits with ranged attacks until the next activation.

daemon_weapons.name: Kai
daemon_weapons.desc: The model gains the "Kai gun" ranged weapon. Unique.
